children.heading: Grants to certain public entities
children.label: a Grants to certain public entities

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary, acting through the Director of the Center for Mental Health Services, shall make grants to public entities for the purpose of providing comprehensive community mental health services to children with a serious emotional disturbance, which may include efforts to identify and serve children at risk.

children.heading: “Public entity” defined
children.label: 2 “Public entity” defined
children.text: For purposes of this part, the term “public entity” means any State, any political subdivision of a State, and any Indian tribe or tribal organization (as defined in section 5304(b) and section 5304(c) of title 25).1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Requirement of status as grantee under part B of subchapter XVII
children.label: 1 Requirement of status as grantee under part B of subchapter XVII
A
children.text: in the case of a public entity that is a State, the State is a grantee under ;section 300x of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a public entity that is a political subdivision of a State, the State in which the political subdivision is located is such a grantee; and

children.label: C
children.text: in the case of a public entity that is an Indian tribe or tribal organization, the State in which the tribe or tribal organization is located is such a grantee.

children.heading: Requirement of status as medicaid provider
children.label: 2 Requirement of status as medicaid provider
i
children.text: the public entity involved will provide the service directly, and the entity has entered into a participation agreement under the State plan and is qualified to receive payments under such plan; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the public entity will enter into an agreement with an organization under which the organization will provide the service, and the organization has entered into such a participation agreement and is qualified to receive such payments.

children.label: i
children.text: In the case of an organization making an agreement under subparagraph (A)(ii) regarding the provision of services under subsection (a), the requirement established in such subparagraph regarding a participation agreement shall be waived by the Secretary if the organization does not, in providing health or mental health services, impose a charge or accept reimbursement available from any third-party payor, including reimbursement under any insurance policy or under any Federal or State health benefits program.

children.label: ii
children.text: A determination by the Secretary of whether an organization referred to in clause (i) meets the criteria for a waiver under such clause shall be made without regard to whether the organization accepts voluntary donations regarding the provision of services to the public.

children.label: A
children.text: equitably allocate such assistance among the principal geographic regions of the United States;

children.label: B
children.text: consider the extent to which the public entity involved has a need for the grant; and

children.label: i
children.text: shall consider any comments regarding the application of the entity for such a grant that are received by the Secretary from the State in which the entity is located; and

children.label: ii
children.text: shall give special consideration to the entity if the State agrees to provide a portion of the non-Federal contributions required in subsection (c) regarding such a grant.

children.label: A
children.text: for the first fiscal year for which the entity receives payments from a grant under such subsection, is not less than $1 for each $3 of Federal funds provided in the grant;

children.label: B
children.text: for any second or third such fiscal year, is not less than $1 for each $3 of Federal funds provided in the grant;

children.label: C
children.text: for any fourth such fiscal year, is not less than $1 for each $1 of Federal funds provided in the grant; and

children.label: D
children.text: for any fifth and sixth such fiscal year, is not less than $2 for each $1 of Federal funds provided in the grant.2So in original. Probably should be “years,”.2

children.label: A
children.text: Non-Federal contributions required in paragraph (1) may be in cash or in kind, fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services. Amounts provided by the Federal Government, or services assisted or subsidized to any significant extent by the Federal Government, may not be included in determining the amount of such non-Federal contributions.

children.label: B
children.text: In making a determination of the amount of non-Federal contributions for purposes of subparagraph (A), the Secretary may include only non-Federal contributions in excess of the average amount of non-Federal contributions made by the public entity involved toward the purpose described in subsection (a) for the 2-year period preceding the first fiscal year for which the entity receives a grant under such section.
